summary: BTC Tools | Configs | Skyview | Navigation and UI Validation
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools Page
And the user clicks on the Configs Dropdown
And the user clicks on the Skyview
And !xray-attachment://9fc42c68-aad8-46fc-90af-b5a93122bb93|width=1469,height=405!
Then the user lands on the Schedule Page by default
And the user should see: "Pipeline", "Pipeline Input", "Skyview", and "Multicast
Mapping"
And the user lands on the Skyview Configs page
And the user should see the "Search teams" search box
And the user should see team cards (logo, name, abbreviation, ID) with Language and
Status columns
And the user should see a toggle switch for Eng and a toggle switch for Spa on each
team card
And the user should see the "Enable All Configs" and "Disable All Configs" buttons in
the top-right area
